overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rural countryside during golden hour. The character travels from a rocky cliffside into an open valley, encountering a horse rider traveling in the opposite direction.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path beside a rocky cliff face

entered.detail: tall sedimentary rock cliff face with visible layers and texture
large gray boulders at the base of the cliff
worn dirt path with grass growing at the edges
large deciduous tree with dense green canopy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the left side. Large boulders rest at the cliff base while an oak tree stands prominently on the right. The path is enclosed by vegetation and rock, creating an intimate, canyon-like atmosphere.

events.description: exits the enclosed cliffside into open countryside with expansive horizon views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal rolling hills and distant valleys

entered.detail: grass-covered slope replacing the rocky cliff terrain
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
weathered wooden post fence running parallel to the trail
distant red wooden barn structures visible in the valley

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the rocky cliff recedes, revealing expansive grassy hills and a distant horizon. The character passes a utility pole and approaches wooden fence lines while the large oak tree falls behind. Distant farm buildings become visible in the valley ahead.

events.description: horse rider appears in the distance approaching on the trail
horse rider passes by going the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as a horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by closely

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse approaching from down the trail and passing by going opposite direction

entered.detail: loose rocks and stones along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a rural valley where wooden fences line the path and distant farm buildings sit on the horizon. A horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by going the opposite direction, continuing down the trail into the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, rocky cliffside path into an expansive rural valley. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail hugged by a steep cliff face and large boulders, with a prominent oak tree framing the right side of the intimate canyon. As the rocky walls recede, the scene opens up to reveal rolling grassy hills and a distant horizon, passing a utility pole and wooden fence lines as the oak tree falls behind. The camera then continues forward into the wide valley where farm buildings appear in the distance, eventually crossing paths with a horse rider traveling in the opposite direction. The movement finally settles into the open landscape as the rider disappears down the trail toward the horizon.
